---
title: "Organize Data Notebook"
---
#| label: load-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
```{r}
#label: timestamp-start

timestamp()
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("utils","check_packages.R"))
source(here("utils","functions.R"))
```

This quarto doc is used to organize the data.

# Load the Data

```{r}

rps <- read_excel(here("data", "data_raw", "RPS.xlsx"))

```

# Inspect Data

```{r}
#| label: inspect-data

names(rps)

glimpse(rps)
str(rps)
dim(rps)
```

```{r}
summary(rps)
```

```{r}
# Rename variables
cleaned_dataset <- rps %>%
  rename(
    state = State,
    rps_2008 = RPS2008,
    rps_2009 = PRS2009,
    renewable_share_2008 = `%Renewable2008`,
    renewable_share_2009 = `%Renewable2009`
  )
```

```{r}
# State as factor
cleaned_dataset <- cleaned_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    state = factor(state)
  )
```

```{r}
# missing values 
summary(cleaned_dataset)
```
```{r}
# change variabel 
cleaned_dataset <- cleaned_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    rps_change = rps_2009 - rps_2008,
    renewable_share_change = renewable_share_2009 - renewable_share_2008
  )
```

```{r}
#label: timestamp-end

timestamp()
```
